steps.name: Read brief & plan
steps.description: AI reads full markdown brief, plans page structure
steps.humanReview: Review plan, check nothing missed from brief

steps.name: Generate HTML/CSS
steps.description: AI generates landing page code referencing brief for brand details
steps.humanReview: Review code for accuracy: colors, copy, sections, layout

steps.name: Fix brand inconsistencies
steps.description: AI re-reads brief to fix color codes, tone, missed sections
steps.humanReview: Cross-check every brand element against brief manually

steps.name: Add SEO & meta
steps.description: AI reads brief again for SEO targets, generates meta tags
steps.humanReview: Verify SEO keywords match brief, check meta descriptions

steps.name: Responsive polish
steps.description: AI adjusts layout, re-reads brief for mobile requirements
steps.humanReview: Test on mobile viewports, verify accessibility

steps.name: Query KB & plan
steps.description: AI queries KB for entity types, requirements, brand. Gets compressed context.
steps.humanReview: Review plan — KB entities are pre-reviewed, so plan is grounded

steps.name: Generate HTML/CSS
steps.description: AI generates landing page. Every brand detail is a typed triple — no re-reading prose.
steps.humanReview: Review code — brand facts are structurally correct from KB

steps.name: Verify against KB
steps.description: Diff generated code against KB: which triples were used, which were missed?
steps.humanReview: Review diff report — structural, not manual cross-checking

steps.name: Add SEO & meta
steps.description: Query KB for seo-target and cta predicates directly
steps.humanReview: SEO targets are typed triples — verify they match

steps.name: Responsive polish
steps.description: Query KB for constraint predicates (mobile-responsive, accessible)
steps.humanReview: Test on mobile viewports, verify accessibility
